title: Google Cloud Dataflow Job
description: Defines a Dataflow job representing a pipeline execution. A job encapsulates the pipeline configuration, environment, execution state, and metadata for batch or streaming workloads on Google Cloud Platform.

id.description: The unique identifier of the job, assigned by the server and immutable once set.

projectId.description: The ID of the Google Cloud project that owns this job.

name.description: The user-assigned name of the job. Job names do not need to be unique within a project.

type.description: The type of Dataflow job, indicating batch or streaming execution.

currentState.description: The current state of the job, representing its lifecycle position from creation through completion or cancellation.

currentStateTime.description: The timestamp of the most recent state transition.

requestedState.description: The state requested for the job, such as cancelling or draining.

createTime.description: The timestamp when the job was initially created.

startTime.description: The timestamp when the job began executing.

environment.description: The execution environment configuration for the job.

steps.description: The pipeline processing steps that define the job.

kind.description: The type of transform this step represents.

name.description: The unique name of this step within the job.

properties.description: Named properties associated with the step.

stepsLocation.description: The Cloud Storage location where step information is stored.

stageStates.description: The per-stage execution state information for the job.

executionStageName.description: The name of the execution stage.

executionStageState.description: The state of the execution stage.

currentStateTime.description: The time at which the stage entered its current state.

pipelineDescription.description: A description of the pipeline structure.

labels.description: User-defined labels for the job as key-value string pairs.

location.description: The regional endpoint where this job runs, such as us-central1.

createdFromSnapshotId.description: If this job was created from a snapshot, the ID of that snapshot.

replacedByJobId.description: If this job has been replaced by another job, the ID of the replacement.

replaceJobId.description: If this job is replacing another job, the ID of the job being replaced.

clientRequestId.description: A unique client-generated idempotency key for preventing duplicate job creation.

tempFiles.description: A set of Cloud Storage files used for temporary storage.

jobMetadata.description: Metadata about the job for filtering and discovery.

sdkVersion.description: The version of the SDK used to run the job.

sdkSupportStatus.description: The support status for this SDK version.

spannerDetails.description: Cloud Spanner sources used by this job.

bigqueryDetails.description: BigQuery sources used by this job.

bigTableDetails.description: Cloud Bigtable sources used by this job.

pubsubDetails.description: Pub/Sub sources used by this job.

fileDetails.description: File-based sources used by this job.

datastoreDetails.description: Datastore sources used by this job.

runtimeUpdatableParams.description: Parameters that can be updated during execution without stopping the job.

maxNumWorkers.description: The maximum number of workers for autoscaling.

minNumWorkers.description: The minimum number of workers for autoscaling.

serviceResources.description: Resources allocated by the Dataflow service for the job.

zones.description: The Cloud zones from which resources are allocated.
